name: Vito & Nick's
hours: Mon-Thu: 11:00 AM – 8:30 PM, Fri-Sat: 11:00 AM – 9:30 PM, Sun: 12:00 – 8:00 PM
teaser: In addition to fantastic bar pies, the granddaddy of Chicago thin-crust pizza has a great dive bar atmosphere.
address: 8433 S Pulaski Rd, Chicago, IL 60652, USA
review: Chicago thin-crust pizza is having a moment, but this landmark has been having one since the 1950s. The square-cut, crispy tavern-style pies are legitimately great and best enjoyed on site (with a watery beer). Vito & Nick's dive bar interior looks like it's been cobbled together from different eras of its existence, but OG is something you can't fake...and this place is a certified classic.
